scripts.i18n:lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='public/locales';let fail=false;for(const lng of fs.readdirSync(dir)){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(path.join(dir,lng))){const file=path.join(dir,lng,f);const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'));const empties=[];(function walk(o,prefix){for(const[k,v]of Object.entries(o)){const key=prefix?prefix+'.'+k:k;if(typeof v==='string'&&v==='')empties.push(key);else if(typeof v==='object'&&v)walk(v,key)}})(data,'');if(empties.length){console.error('Empty translations in '+file+':',empties.join(', '));fail=true;}}}if(fail)process.exit(1);else console.log('i18n lint passed');"
